product: Preset date ranges for parameters in the SQL editor
tagline: In the new SQL editor, you can now choose from preset date ranges—such as This week, Last 30 days, or Last year when using timestamp, date, and date range parameters.
what_it_does: In the new SQL editor, you can now choose from preset date ranges—such as This week, Last 30 days, or Last year when using timestamp, date, and date range parameters. These presets make it faster to apply common time filters without manually entering dates.
why_it_matters: These presets make it faster to apply common time filters without manually entering dates.
key_takeaway: In the new SQL editor, you can now choose from preset date ranges—such as This week, Last 30 days, or Last year when using timestamp, date, and date range parameters.
